name: Golfers Hideaway LLC
about: Golfers Hideaway is an upscale, members-only indoor golf facility providing golfers of all skill levels with the ability to play or practice in the privacy of their own "Hideaway" while golfing on the world's most accurate golf simulator, TrackMan. The venue features two private bays equipped with TrackMan iO technology, open year-round for practice, lessons, and play regardless of weather. Golfers can play over 300 courses from around the world, including Pebble Beach, in a comfortable climate-controlled environment with instant and accurate shot data.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan iO technology provides the most accurate ball and club tracking data
Year-round climate-controlled environment ensures perfect playing conditions
Privacy of private bays allows for focused practice and play
Access to over 300 courses worldwide including famous destinations like Pebble Beach

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Two private bays featuring TrackMan iO technology

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state if clubs are provided or required. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks. Contact the venue directly for details on their policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes a single player approximately 45-60 minutes to complete 18 holes. A foursome should be able to finish a round within 3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specifically mention kid-friendliness. It does mention programs for beginners and all skill levels, but no specific junior programs or family features are highlighted.
